hypothesis_en: Mr President, I would like to ask you, as rapporteur for the report on the Working Time Directive, to ask you to vote on the third ballot, because there are negotiations between various parliamentary groups and they have asked me to do so a moment ago.
reference_en: thank you ~P_president thank you very much (1.52) I am the rapporteur for an own initiative report that is gonna be voted tomorrow on Tuesday on organisation of working time different parliamentary groups have informed me that there is a possibility of arriving at agreements in the course of tomorrow but they need to have preparatory meetings for that so President I was going to ask you (1.23) for the vote to be postponed until ~Wedn_esday because it was on Tuesday's agenda ((MEP speaking)) pas de translation I need to repeat ((MEP stops speaking)) ((Chairman starts speaking)) yes some of the colleagues not have interpretation thank you Mr ~Kirkas ((Chairman stops speaking)) is English coming through (2.12) I was saying President that I am the rapporteur for this own initiative report (1.1) I am rapporteur for this own initiative report on the organisation of working time and there's an interruption I'm afraid ((Chairman starts speaking)) it's working there appears to be a technical problem with the German interpretation it's okay now ((Chairman stops speaking)) ((MEP speaking)) repeat ((MEP stops speaking)) ((Chairman starts speaking)) Mr ~Kirkas one more time please ((Chairman stops speaking)) ((MEP speaking)) one more sí yes ((applause)) a la ter= ((MEP stops speaking)) one more time with gusto third time lucky as we say in Spanish as I was saying I'm rapporteur for the own initiative report on the organisation of working time (1.19) and I would ask for the vote on that to be taken on Wednesday instead of tomorrow because negotiations are underway between different parliamentary groups and several members have asked me to do this so please to allow us to continue working on this tomorrow could we vote on Wednesday on that thank you
source_es: señor Presidente muchas gracias (1.14) soy rapporteur de un informe de iniciativa que debe votarse mañana martes sobre la ordenación del tiempo de trabajo diversos grupos parlamentarios me acaban de decir que hay una posibilidad de llegar a acuerdos a lo largo del día de mañana pero necesitan tener reuniones preparatorias señor Presidente querría solicitarle querría solicitarle que esta votación se traslade al miércoles y está señalada para ho= mañana martes pas de translation I need to repeat sí señor Presidente ((Chairman starts speaking)) some of the colleagues not have interpretation thank you Mr ~Kirkas (1.21) ((Chairman stops speaking)) sí le decía señor Presidente que como rapporteur del informe de iniciativa como rapporteur del informe de iniciativa sobre la Directiva de tiempo de trabajo le solicito que pase ((Chairman starts speaking)) it's working there appears to be a technical problem with (1.42) the German interpretation it's okay now ((Chairman stops speaking)) repeat ((Chairman starts speaking)) Mr ~Kirkas one more time please ((Chairman stops speaking)) one more sí yes ((applause)) a la tercera va la vencida dice un refrán castellano le decía señor Presidente que como rapporteur del informe de iniciativa sobre la Directiva de tiempo de trabajo solicitaría que la votación en lugar de ser mañana sea el miércoles puesto que hay negociaciones entre diversos grupos parlamentarios y así me lo han solicitado hace un momento por tanto si fuera posible nos gustaría poder continuar trabajando mañana y que se votara el miércoles (2.9)
